description:
Add an "em" (engineering manager) agent profile to agent-runtime-config.v2.json. This agent runs on a periodic tick (configurable interval, default every 5 ticks) to evaluate the backlog and produce an ordered work queue.

Add a new daemon hook point: before the scheduler picks tasks, if the EM tick is due, run the EM agent first and use its output to populate the work queue. The EM agent should be a lightweight, fast invocation — not a full workflow.
title: Add EM agent profile and scheduling phase to runtime config
